Thomas Rice, 1555 - 1621
Thomas Rice was born in 1555, in birth place , to William Ap Rhys and Thomasine Ap Rhys (born Myal) .
William was born in 1522, in Newport, Buckinghamshire, England.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Rice於1564年出生在英國時，他的父親William Rice34歲，母親Thomasine Myall32歲。他於1579年6月22日與Margaret Baker在英國素福爾可素德波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國素福爾可斯坦斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Rice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized pronunciation of one of the most common Welsh personal names, Rhys, from a form originally meaning ‘rash, impetuous’, also spelled Rys and Re(e)s. See also Reese , with which it is interchangeable as a result of different Anglicized forms of the Welsh vowel y, and also compare Preece and Price . Initial R- in Welsh is voiceless and often spelled Rh-, but in English R- is voiced as in the Anglicized surnames Rees and Rice. Welsh y is a short back vowel /ɪ/. In the medieval period the English approximation of this vowel was either /i/ or /e/, lengthened to /i:/ and /e:/. Subsequent sound changes in English produced the alternative pronunciations represented in Rees, Preece and Rice, Price. The name has also been established in Ireland from an early date.

English: either a topographic name for someone who lived in or near a thicket (Middle English ris, rice, ris, from Old English hrīs, Old Norse hrís), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place called with this word, such as Rise (East Yorkshire).

English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English Rys(e) and Re(e)s which when without a preposition could derive from one or other of several Old French and Middle English words, including Anglo-Norman French ris ‘laughter, smile’, Middle English ris, res ‘stem, stalk’, in origin the same word as in 2 above, and Middle English ris, rise, rice, res, Old French ris, riz ‘rice’, perhaps a nickname for a rice dealer or a cook.

variants.name: Reese
meanings: North German and Dutch (De Reese): nickname for a very big man, from Middle Low German, Middle Dutch rese ‘giant’.
German: habitational name from any of the places called Rees or Reese, in Rhineland and Lower Saxony.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

variants.name: Ryce
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Rice  .

variants.name: Rise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Aase, Lief, Sven.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of over twenty farmsteads named Rise, from Old Norse hrís ‘brushwood’. The name also occurs in Sweden and Denmark.

variants.name: Wrice
meanings: Probably Welsh or English: variant of   Rice  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Rice was born in 1564, in England, his father, William Rice, was 34 and his mother, Thomasine Myall, was 32. He married Margaret Baker on 22 June 1579, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He was buried in Stanstead, Suffolk, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Rice(이)가 1564년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Rice(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasine Myall(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1579년 6월 22일 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 Margaret Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 수폴크 스탠스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Rice nasceu em 1564, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William Rice, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Myall, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Baker em 22 de junho de 1579, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Rice родился в 1564 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени William Rice было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Myall, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Baker 22 июня 1579 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности станстид, суффолк, Англия.
